name: content-curator
description: Curate external content into Obsidian. Clip web pages, extract PDF highlights, transcribe audio/video to markdown.
author: Claude (Claudian)
examples: /content-curator clip <url> - 剪藏网页并转为 Markdown
/content-curator extract-pdf - 从 PDF 提取高亮和注释
/content-curator transcribe - 将音频/视频转为文字笔记
/content-curator auto-categorize - 自动分类导入的内容
